subject: An ornate metallic locket bearing the Azorius Senate insignia, suspended on a chain against a backdrop of legal documents
description: A circular, silver-and-blue metallic locket dominates the frame, embossed with the angular three-pointed Azorius Senate sigil at its center. The locket is open or partially split, revealing inner gear-like mechanical detail. It hangs from a delicate silver chain. The background is a layered wash of pale blue and white parchment or document pages covered in dense, indistinct text — suggesting bureaucratic paperwork, statutes, or legal scripture. The lighting is cool and even, giving the metal a polished, jewel-like quality. The composition is centered and emblematic, almost heraldic.
foreground: ornate silver-and-blue locket with Azorius sigil, suspended on chain
background: layered pale-blue parchment pages of legal text
